title: MapConfig
description: Map identification configuration emitted by apps/tooling and consumed by apps/mobile. Detection is ROI+HSV-band-based across all versions; the schema_version discriminates between config shapes that evolved with successive HUD generations. v1 (HUD V1 era) carries the legacy `minimap_identification` block (single config, per-map weighted zones). v2 (HUD V2 era, post-9.9b hand-merge) carries a top-level game_state_zones cascade + flat per-map ZoneSpec lists. Both branches use the same ROI+HSV detection algorithm at runtime.

schema_version.description: Discriminator. 1 = legacy HUD V1 shape (minimap_identification block, weighted zones). 2 = HUD V2 shape (game_state_zones cascade + flat per-map ZoneSpec lists).

oneOf.title: MapConfigV1
oneOf.description: HUD V1 shape — minimap_identification block with a single config object holding identification_threshold + minimap ROI + per-map zone lists. Each zone carries a weight/weight_override pair used by the runtime detector. Mirrors apps/tooling/config/config.yaml's minimap_identification.configs[0] shape, with the configs[] array wrapper flattened (only ever one entry in practice).

reference_resolution.description: Source video resolution the zone coordinates are calibrated against.

id.description: Identifier of the calibration profile this config carries. Today only 'test' exists; left configurable for future per-profile A/B variations.

identification_threshold.description: Minimum aggregate match score (sum of per-zone fires x weight) above which a map is considered identified.

roi.description: The minimap ROI inside the frame - zone coordinates are expressed relative to this rectangle's top-left.

maps.description: Map slug -> per-map detector entry. Slugs are lowercased ASCII (e.g. 'the_cliff').

oneOf.title: MapConfigV2
oneOf.description: HUD V2 shape - emitted from Tool 8's discovered_zones.yaml fragment after hand-merge into config.yaml. Each map gets a flat list of ZoneSpec entries; the game_state_zones block carries the 4-way lobby/in_match/score/transition cascade. No weight/weight_override on zones (re-introduction is a future-config-version decision).

game_state_zones.description: 4-way game-state cascade. All four keys are required; each holds a (possibly empty) list of ZoneSpec entries.

maps.description: Map slug -> list of ZoneSpec entries that fingerprint the map. Empty zone lists are allowed for maps that haven't been fingerprinted yet.

Hsv.description: User-space HSV band center + per-channel tolerance. H in [0,360]; H tolerance in [0,180] (half-circle max); S/V in [0,100].

V1ZoneSpec.description: Per-zone detector cell for HUD V1. Carries `weight` (contribution to the aggregate identification score) and `weight_override` (per-zone weight bypass flag).

V2ZoneSpec.description: Per-zone detector cell for HUD V2. Coordinates are at reference_resolution. Mirrors Tool 8's fragment shape at auto_roi_discoverer/export.py:72-91. No weight/weight_override - every zone contributes equally.
